prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic editorial triptych of Met Gala red-carpet couture photographs featuring the same glamorous woman in three different luxury gowns, arranged as three equal vertical panels separated by thin black borders.

Canvas: Wide horizontal collage, approximately 3:2 aspect ratio, with three side-by-side full-height photo panels. Use hyper-realistic DSLR event photography, candid celebrity gala lighting, shallow depth of field, flash highlights, warm indoor museum tones, and crowded paparazzi backgrounds. Faces of background guests and photographers may be softly blurred, while the main subject remains sharp.

Layout: Exactly 3 discrete panels. Panel 1 on the left shows a front-facing red-carpet pose; Panel 2 in the center shows a rear three-quarter walking pose; Panel 3 on the right shows a formal full-body staircase pose.

Subject details: The same adult woman with dark brunette hair and an elegant celebrity presence appears in all three panels. Keep the face softly anonymized or unfocused, but preserve realistic skin, posture, jewelry, and couture styling.

Panel 1 outfit: A dramatic scarlet red strapless couture ball gown with a sweetheart neckline, structured corset bodice, refined gold embroidery, glittering crystal accents, sheer red tulle volume, and a romantic flowing skirt. The woman stands on a red-carpet staircase area, one hand lifted near her chin and the other near her waist. Add diamond necklace and bracelet. Background includes paparazzi, guests in black formalwear, camera flashes, and green hedge decor with red flowers.

Panel 2 outfit: A luminous pearl silver off-the-shoulder couture gown photographed from behind and slightly to the side. The dress has crystal embroidery, delicate short draped sleeves, a fitted sparkling bodice, a high leg slit, sheer flowing cape-like train, long translucent fabric pooling across the carpet, and moon/star-like celestial embellishments. The woman holds part of the train while walking. Background includes dense paparazzi, bright flash bursts, white floral hedge decor, and a dark blue gala carpet.

Panel 3 outfit: A black off-the-shoulder mermaid gown with ornate metallic antique gold baroque embroidery, long sleeves, fitted silhouette, dramatic circular chest motifs, and a small sweeping train. The woman stands centered on cream marble stairs with a red-carpet runner, hands posed gracefully in front. Background includes museum architecture, warm wall sconces, velvet ropes, trimmed greenery, and tuxedoed attendants.

Visual style: Photorealistic, high-fashion celebrity event photography, Met Gala atmosphere, luxurious couture textures, realistic fabric weight, sparkling beadwork, accurate red-carpet lighting, cinematic paparazzi flashes, vertical fashion-magazine composition inside each panel.

Constraints: Include exactly 3 panels and exactly 3 couture gowns: 1 scarlet-red gold-embroidered ball gown, 1 pearl-silver celestial train gown, and 1 black-and-gold baroque mermaid gown. Do not add captions, logos, watermarks, or extra text. Keep the collage seamless and realistic, with thin black dividers between panels.
